title: TRANSPORTATION COMMITTEE REPORT relative to transit vehicle advertising, the current contract, and the Request for Proposals issued in 2023.

appearances.section: Items for which Public Hearings Have Been Held
appearances.recommendation: NOTE and FILE the Los Angeles Department of Transportation (LADOT) report dated July 22, 2025, attached to the Council file, relative to an update on the current transit vehicle advertising contract, the number of vehicles and type of advertisement, revenue generated, and the Request for Proposals issued in 2023, inasmuch as this report is for information only and no Council action is required. Fiscal Impact Statement: Not applicable. Community Impact Statement: None submitted.
